channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Mother of American missing in Japan says they argued over ChatGPT
item.description: James 'Weston' Higginbotham disappeared a week ago while on a family trip to Japan.

item.title: Missing American student found dead in Japan
item.description: Volunteers searching a mountainous area near Kyoto discovered the body of Auburn student James "Weston" Higginbotham, his mother confirmed on Facebook.

item.title: DOJ lawyer says in court filing that 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' is 'not going forward'
item.description: A DOJ attorney stated in a court filing Friday that the Trump administration's "Anti-Weaponization Fund" has not been established and will not proceed.

item.title: U.S. and Iran trade another round of fire
item.description: The proximity of a U.S.-Iran deal remains uncertain, with an Iranian official stating "the ball is in Trump's court," while Israel-Hezbollah hostilities continue.
